artistContext.name: Noizekid
artistContext.summary: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry. He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.

writer.title: Noizekid: A Profile of the Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
writer.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer mark his trajectory.
writer.author: D. Varela
writer.excerpt: Noizekid stands as a notable figure in the moombahton and dancehall landscape, with a portfolio that includes collaborations with prominent industry names.

content.text: Noizekid emerges as a significant contributor to the moombahton and dancehall scene, with a career marked by high-profile collaborations and innovative production techniques.
His work has intersected with major industry figures such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer, underscoring his influence within the genre.

In addition to his production credits, Noizekid has expanded his creative output through the release of the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in partnership with Barnation, a collection that includes his signature samples, loops, and drum patterns.
This sample pack not only provides insight into his production methods but also serves as a resource for fellow producers seeking to incorporate his distinctive sound into their work.
While his discography and track listings remain unindexed in available databases, his contributions to the moombahton and dancehall genres continue to resonate within the music community.
